name: centella asiatica
title: centella asiatica benefits
description: Centella asiatica boosts immune system by enhancing the body's natural defense mechanisms to fight off infections and diseases. This benefit is crucial as a strong immune system can prevent illnesses such as the common cold, flu, and even more severe conditions like pneumonia and sepsis.
